instruction:
In $\triangle{ABC}$ , let $D$ and $E$ be points on sides $AC$ and $BC$ , respectively, so that $DE$ is parallel to $AB$ . Let $P$ be the intersection of $AE$ and $BD$ , and assume that the area of $\triangle{ABP}=36$ and the area of $\triangle{EDP}=25$ . Find the area of $\triangle{ABC}$

Options:
A. 384
B. 376
C. 369
D. 385
E. 390
F. 375
G. 391
H. 396
I. 361
J. 380
